docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $703.00 FILED BY ANG, EDWARD AS TO DEFENDANT AGRAWAL, ANDY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-09-2012 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
